description_long: This is a standard-sized, cylindrical aluminum can with a glossy, deep red exterior and metallic silver accents. The can features the iconic Coca-Cola branding in white script, with a dynamic silver wave design running vertically along the sides. The surface is highly reflective and appears to have a glittery or speckled finish, enhancing its visual appeal. The can is open at the top, with a detached black pull-tab lying nearby, indicating it has been opened. The top rim is metallic and slightly recessed, typical of beverage cans. There are no visible dents, scratches, or signs of wear, and the can appears empty.
description: A glossy red Coca-Cola aluminum can with silver accents and a detached black pull-tab, featuring a glittery finish and no visible damage.
description_view_0: The can is shown with the silver wave design and a stylized script, with the black pull-tab lying in front.
description_view_1: The Coca-Cola logo is fully visible in white script, with the pull-tab positioned to the left side.
description_view_2: The can is angled to show both the Coca-Cola logo and the silver wave, with the pull-tab behind the can.
description_view_3: The can's back side is visible, showing the silver wave and a partial logo, with the pull-tab to the right.
attribute_label_or_branding: White Coca-Cola script logo with silver wave design on a red glittery background, placed vertically along the can's body.
